SELECT h3IndexesAreNeighbors(a.index, b.index) AS n FROM h3_indexes AS a JOIN h3_indexes AS b ON a.index != b.index;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT h3IndexesAreNeighbors(a.index, b.index) AS n FROM h3_indexes AS a JOIN h3_indexes AS b ON a.index != b.index WHERE n = 1);
SELECT h3IndexesAreNeighbors(index1, index2) FROM (SELECT h3_indexes.index AS index1, h3_indexes.index AS index2 FROM h3_indexes) WHERE index1 <> index2;
CREATE TABLE h3_neighbors (index1 UInt64, index2 UInt64, are_neighbors UInt8);
INSERT INTO h3_neighbors SELECT a.index, b.index, h3IndexesAreNeighbors(a.index, b.index) FROM h3_indexes AS a JOIN h3_indexes AS b ON a.index != b.index;
SELECT index1, index2 FROM h3_neighbors WHERE are_neighbors = 1;
SELECT index1, index2 FROM h3_neighbors WHERE are_neighbors = 0;
WITH (617420388351344639) AS idx1, (617420388352655359) AS idx2 SELECT h3IndexesAreNeighbors(idx1, idx2) AS n;
WITH (617420388351344639) AS idx1, (617420388351344640) AS idx2 SELECT h3IndexesAreNeighbors(idx1, idx2) AS n;
